ExternalServiceRegistration.description: Collection of requested @AuraEnabled Apex method APIs
ExternalServiceRegistration.label: OpportunityMcpServiceAuraEnbaled
ExternalServiceRegistration.schema: openapi: 3.0.1 info: title: "@AuraEnabled Apex method APIs" version: 1.0.0 description: Collection of requested @AuraEnabled Apex method APIs servers: - url: /services/aura-controllers/custom paths: /OpportunityMcpServiceAuraEnbaled/getHighValueOpportunities: description: Default description for the path. post: description: Default description for the operation. operationId: getHighValueOpportunities requestBody: description: Default description for the requestBody. required: false content: application/json: schema: type: object properties: minimumAmount: type: number responses: "200": description: Status Code 200 content: application/json: schema: type: array items: type: object properties: accountName: type: string amount: type: number closeDate: type: string format: date name: type: string opportunityId: type: string stageName: type: string components: schemas: {}
